# spirl_org_config (Resource)

Manages organization-level configuration sections in SPIRL. Each section is a self-describing YAML document keyed by section name.

No configuration sections are currently supported at the organization scope.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# No configuration sections are currently supported at the organization scope.
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `sections` (Map of String) A map of configuration section names to their self-describing YAML values

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier for this singleton resource. Always "ORG".
- `updated_at` (String) An RFC3339 timestamp for when the configuration was last updated
- `version` (String) The configuration version, used for optimistic concurrency control
